App Setup
=========

|PRODUCT_NAME| can be monitored and controlled using the official mobile application.

Basic Features
--------------

- Real-time power monitoring
- Input and output status display
- Battery level monitoring
- Firmware updates

.. note::

   The official manual provides detailed step-by-step screenshots
   for connecting the device to the mobile application.
